title: Somago
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Somago.jpg|thumb|a helmet somago]]
'''Somago''', also called '''chokers''', were carnivorous worms akin the [[raen sovra]], and like it, native to [[Tenek (planet)|Tenek]]. While arboreal in nature, it avoided the [[vinna]] forest habitat of the raen sovra. The worms fell on prey passing below their perches and constricted them to death. There were several species, each named for their unique shape:

*[[flat sheet somago]]
*[[saddle somago]]
*[[tapestry somago]]
*[[helmet somago]]

The helmet somago was the rarest species, shaped perfectly to envelop the head of a humanoid victim.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
